center.name: Charles Dixon (ornithologist)
center.summary: Charles Dixon (ornithologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Atlas wheatear，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Atlas wheatear (Oenanthe seebohmi), also known as the black-throated wheatear or Seebohm's wheatear, is a small passerine bird which breeds in the Maghreb region of North Africa and winters in the western Sahel

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Atlas wheatear (Oenanthe seebohmi), also known as the black-throated wheatear or Seebohm's wheatear, is a small passerine bird which breeds in the Maghreb region of North Africa and winters in the western Sahel
